description: Synthetic deterministic trend → collapse fixture. 50 flat daily closes + a single $150 spike to push price above SMA50, plus 9 flat weekly closes + a $130 weekly. Frame 1 enters at $145. Frame 2 collapses to $50 with daily_append [50, 50] which drops the trailing-50 SMA below the new spot price, triggering exit:daily_flip. Timestamps stored as minutes-ago so the fixture stays evergreen against the strategy's staleness check.
